patterns.name: Vibrant Energy
patterns.description: High saturation, energetic tones for youthful or fitness brands.
patterns.prompt_injection: High energy color palette, vibrant saturated tones contrasting with deep blacks, dynamic visual hierarchy.

patterns.name: Elegant Monochrome
patterns.prompt_injection: Elegant monochromatic color palette, subtle tonal variations, premium luxury aesthetic, cohesive brand identity.

patterns.name: Soft Minimalist
patterns.description: Gentle, calm colors for health, wellness, or minimalist tech.
patterns.prompt_injection: Soft minimalist color palette, gentle pastel tones, airy and inviting, low contrast environment colors emphasizing the subject.
